text: Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a moderator. Check the #mod-onboarding channel for next steps.
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as an event helper. We'll reach out soon with details about upcoming events you can help with.
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a member. Be sure to read the #rules channel and introduce yourself in #introductions!
Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a mentor. We'll connect you with new members who need guidance shortly.
